brief:
[Lesson brief] Top lessons from past sessions:
  1. Always run typecheck before claiming a task complete
  2. When modifying exports, rebuild the package before testing dependents
  3. Prefer narrow repairs over broad rewrites when fixing failing tests
  4. Seed artifact files alongside new features to prove execution to Codex
  5. Use static imports instead of dynamic imports in non-async functions
topPatterns: Always run typecheck before claiming a task complete
When modifying exports, rebuild the package before testing dependents
Prefer narrow repairs over broad rewrites when fixing failing tests
Seed artifact files alongside new features to prove execution to Codex
Use static imports instead of dynamic imports in non-async functions
